name: api-gateway
tagline: ClawHub (392★): Connect to external services through Maton-managed API routes. Use this skill only after the user names the target app, acc
verdict: Main weakness is bloat: roughly 1555 lines, three times the normal budget, including a near-duplicate ~150-line provider list right after the main services table. With ~150 services covered and no exclusion guidance, misfiring against a more specific skill is a real risk. Security stays clean.

highlights.summary: No 'NOT for'/out-of-scope/pointer-to-other-skill language appears anywhere in the description or body, despite the skill covering ~150 different services where misfire against dedi
Beyond the 150+ row Supported Services table, a second ~150-line list duplicating the same providers with links follows this line, all inline in SKILL.md despite an obvious per-pro
File is 1555 lines / ~69KB, roughly 3x the ~500-line/25KB budget (bulk Supported Services table + duplicated per-provider reference link list inline).
